name: Pre-Market Gap Size
description: How large was the pre-market gap at entry? Classifies pm_gap_pct into large gap up, small gap up, flat, or gap down categories.
state_logic: large_gap_up if pm_gap_pct > 3, small_gap_up if 0.5-3%, flat_open if -0.5 to 0.5%, gap_down if < -0.5%

name: Stock Put/Call Ratio Entry
description: Stock-level options put/call ratio at entry. Low PCR = bullish positioning, high PCR = bearish positioning. Uses options_pcr from live[ticker] data.
state_logic: bullish_pcr if options_pcr < 0.7, bearish_pcr if > 1.3, otherwise neutral_pcr

name: Monthly Price Momentum
description: 20-day (approximately 1-month) price change at entry. Measures the momentum runway before the trade. Uses chg20d from live data.
state_logic: strong_up_month if chg20d > 15%, moderate_up_month if 3-15%, flat_month if -3 to 3%, down_month if < -3%

name: 52-Week Breakout Entry
description: Is the stock breaking out to or near 52-week highs? Uses breakout_52w boolean from live data to classify entry context.
state_logic: at_52w_break if breakout_52w is True, near_52w_high if dist_from_52w_high < 5 but not breaking, otherwise mid_range_52w

name: Historical Volatility Level
description: 20-day historical (realized) volatility level at entry. High vol = wider swings, low vol = compression setup. Uses hv20 from live data.
state_logic: high_realized_vol if hv20 > 50, low_compressed_vol if < 20, otherwise normal_vol

name: AVWAP Distance at Entry
description: How far is price from the anchored VWAP (52-week low anchor) at entry? Measures overextension or value zone. Uses avwap_dist_pct from live data.
state_logic: extended_above_avwap if avwap_dist_pct > 10%, below_avwap if < 0%, otherwise near_avwap

name: 52-Week Range Position
description: Where in the 52-week price range is the stock at entry? Top quartile = near highs, lower half = deep in range. Uses w52_range_pos from live data.
state_logic: top_quartile_52w if w52_range_pos > 75%, upper_half_52w if 50-75%, otherwise lower_half_52w

name: RS Line New High
description: Is the relative strength line making a new high at entry? RS new high confirms leadership. Uses rs_line_new_high boolean from live data.
state_logic: rs_at_new_high if rs_line_new_high is True, otherwise rs_not_new_high

name: RS Line Trend Direction
description: Is the relative strength line trending up vs SPY? Rising RS confirms stock outperformance. Uses rs_line_trending boolean from live data.
state_logic: rs_line_rising if rs_line_trending is True, otherwise rs_line_flat

name: Sector Alpha at Entry
description: Is the stock generating alpha above its sector at entry? Positive sector alpha means stock is outperforming its peers. Uses sector_alpha from live data.
state_logic: high_sector_alpha if sector_alpha > 2%, negative_sector_alpha if < 0%, otherwise neutral_sector_alpha
